front.subtitle: Denizen of the Deep
front.text: Alert. : Parley. Test (4). If you succeed, defeat Kappa.
front.flavor_text: In the water, there is no escape for anyone who crosses a Kappa. On land, however, it is possible to outwit one; the honorable yokai will feel obliged to return a bow, and so can be tricked into spilling the precious water contained in the dish it carries.

front.text:
Hunter 1.
<spawn> Nearest <t>River</t> location.
front.flavor_text: Many of the bloated bodies found in the water were once fisherman who threw themselves overboard in the hopes of hearing the siren's muted serenade more clearly.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Lurker Below
front.text: Hunter 1. Revenge -- Return an Ally asset from your discard pile to your hand.
front.flavor_text:
It is said that the Buwaya carries a chest or 
coffin-like saddle on its back in which it entombs 
the unsuspecting victims it captures.

front.text:
Ambush. 
<spawn> Nearest <t>River</t> location.
Primeval Conductor cannot enter non-<t>River</t> locations.
front.flavor_text:
Blessed by the goddess with biological immortality, 
the ancient conductors have watched over 
these waters for untold aeons.

front.text:
<rev> Attach <name> to the nearest <t>River</t> location without a copy of Hypnotic Whirlpool attached. Limit 1 per location.
<for> When the investigation phase ends: Each investigator at the attached location must test <willpower> (4). Each investigator who fails must test <agility> (3). Each investigator who fails this second test must take 1 damage.
front.flavor_text: "There's something down there..."

front.text: <rev> If The Tyrian Galley is exhausted, <name> gains surge. Otherwise, test <willpower> (3). If you fail, take 1 horror and exhaust The Tyrian Galley.
front.flavor_text: The hairs on your neck stand on end as the nearby water churns as if displaced by an illusory vessel, and the galley is caught in the undertow...

front.text: Peril. Read Scenario Interlude: Damsel In The Deep in the Campaign Guide.
front.flavor_text: A young girl floats to the surface of the water, surrounded by a vanguard of beautifully painted fish...

front.text:
Hunter 1. 
 Lowest .
Advantage -- Exhaust The Tyrian Galley if it is at your location.
front.flavor_text: The nure-onna are said to imitate distressed mothers crying out for their infants in order to attract "help" from unsuspecting sailors and fishermen.

front.text: <rev> The lead investigator must discard cards from the top card of the encounter deck until an enemy is revealed and then draw that enemy.
front.flavor_text:
Ghostly reenactments of a pitched battle 
flicker all around you; even in death, 
Onigawa's defenders remain true.

front.text: <rev> Enemies get +1 fight until the end of the round.
front.flavor_text:
Before it was scuttled, the crew of Onigawa's 
flagship, the Shingetsu, ensured that 
the battleship took as many enemy vessels with 
it as possible during its maiden voyage.

front.text: <rev> Each investigator with no other investigators at their location draws 1 card. Each other investigator must take 1 horror.
front.flavor_text: Driven mad by the influence of a dark power, the once honorable Azure Knight of Onigawa employed brutal methods to "bolster" morale and root out suspected traitors during the siege.

front.text: <rev> Exhaust each <t>Aspect</t> story asset controlled by an investigator. <t>Aspect</t> assets controlled by investigators do not ready during the next upkeep phase.
front.flavor_text: The wards protecting Onigawa were weakened when the impetuous prince of the divine pantheon was imprisoned upon Mount Kokoro.

front.text: <rev> Each investigator must exhaust an <t>Aspect</t> story asset they control. Each investigator who cannot must take 1 direct horror instead.
front.flavor_text:
The shattering of Onigawa's covenant with the Guardians was felt by all those who previously 
enjoyed their divine protection.

front.text: <rev> Each location gets +1 shroud until the end of the round.
front.flavor_text:
When the great cherry blossom tree at the 
center of the city suddenly wilted, this ill omen 
resulted in a critical morale failure among even 
the most loyal of Onigawa's defenders.

front.text: <rev> Until the end of the round, any time a non-<t>Elite</t> enemy would be discarded, you may shuffle it back into the encounter deck, instead. If you do, you may discover a clue from its location.
front.flavor_text:
During the chaos of the siege, rogue elements within 
the city employed increasingly desperate and 
dangerous means to bolster Onigawa's defenses and return their wounded to the frontlines.

front.text: <rev> Move each investigator 1 location towards Royal Palace.
front.flavor_text: Fearing imminent defeat, the royal guard barricaded the surviving members of the court within the palace during the siege...and fought to the death to ensure no one else would be able to follow them inside.

front.text: <rev> Discard all non-<t>Elite</t> enemies from play, then, for each enemy discarded in this way, place 1 doom on the current agenda.
front.flavor_text:
When Onigawa's accord with the divine pantheon 
was severed, its Queen made certain sacrifices 
to ensure her people would endure.

front.text: <rev> Remove 1 doom from the current agenda. The lead investigator must choose one investigator to lose all of their remaining actions this turn.
front.flavor_text:
In the final days of the siege, a fallen 
champion of Onigawa was redeemed 
by the selfless sacrifice of its queen consort.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Maiden of the Black Water
front.text: Hunter 2. Dismal Anchorage. Revenge -- Instead of discarding , remove all damage and doom from her, then exhaust Kayako and move her to Dismal Anchorage.
front.flavor_text: Centuries have passed, but the Maiden of the Black Water still holds onto her grudge...

front.text: Peril. If Kayako is in play, place 1 doom on her and heal all damage from her. Otherwise, search the encounter deck for Kayako (Maiden of the Black Water) and draw her. Shuffle the encounter deck.
front.flavor_text: She hasn't forgotten...and she hasn't forgiven.

front.text:
<rev> Attach <name> to the nearest location without a copy of <name> attached. Limit 1 per location.
Enemies at the attached location gain retaliate.
<reaction> After an enemy is defeated at the attached location: Discard <name>.
front.flavor_text: The fires of war made quick work of the cramped city.

front.text:
Massive.
<for> After Hollow Legion enters play: Place 1 doom on it.
front.flavor_text: For many soldiers, the siege of Onigawa never ended.

front.text: Advantage -- Discard a non-weakness card from your hand. Revenge -- Heal 1 damage from an investigator at your location.
front.flavor_text:
The invaders' orders were clear: 
no one would be allowed to return home 
until they had captured the palace.

front.text: Test (X), where X is the shroud value of your location. If you fail, put 1 additional card from the top of the rally deck into play at the start of the next investigation phase (and resolve its revelation effect).
front.flavor_text:
Before the pantheon fell, the Tengu were the sworn 
defenders of the Stewards of August. During the siege, 
they were recalled to the protect the city, 
leaving Mount Kokoro defenseless.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Betrayer of Onigawa
front.text:
Ambush.
<spawn> Spymaster's Perch.
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Add 1 <curse> to the chaos bag.
front.flavor_text: The Azure Zealot was the first of Onigawa's champions to be seduced by an ancient evil, but he would not be the last.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Martyr of Onigawa
front.text:
Alert.
<spawn> Overgrown Sepulcher.
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Add 1 <curse> to the chaos bag.
front.flavor_text: <name>'s summary execution during the siege led many soldiers to question their commanders' methods.

front.text:
Peril.
<rev> For each location containing at least 1 investigator, you must choose one of the following:
 <bullet> Deal 1 damage to each investigator and enemy at that location.
 <bullet> Flip one clue at that location to its doom side.
Then, place <name> in the victory display.
front.flavor_text: The heavens and the earth trembled in equal measure when the guardian Tsurugi forsook his own divinity in order to join the fray.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Avenger of Onigawa
front.text:
<spawn> Standing Stone.
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Add 1 <curse> to the chaos bag.
front.flavor_text:
In the fires of war, Onigawa's most craven general bargained with a dark power to obtain the strength 
needed to vanquish an entire army.

front.text:
Peril.
<rev> Choose an <t>Elite</t> enemy in play. Move the chosen enemy one location towards your current location and then test <willpower> (X), where X is the chosen enemy's evade value. If you fail, place 1 doom on the chosen enemy.
front.flavor_text: No matter where you run, they always catch you...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Pleasure Is Hers
front.text:
Hunter 1.
<spawn> Any empty location.
<for> After <name> moves: Place 1 damage on <name>.
front.flavor_text:
As the appetites of the court grew increasingly depraved, 
so too were the creations the royal dollmaker 
was tasked with constructing...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Master of Puppets
front.text:
Aloof.
<spawn> Sanguine Altar.
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Place 1 doom on any <t>Elite</t> enemy.
front.flavor_text: Once rumors began to spread that the dolls crafted by the royal dollmaker brought good fortune to their recipients, her services became in increasingly high demand...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Serpentis Mannequin
front.text:
Ambush. Hunter 1.
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Add 1 <curse> to the chaos bag.
front.flavor_text: Lady Bai was once the court's apothecary, well versed in the use and treatment of exotic poisons. When she was betrayed by a treasonous subordinate during the siege, the royal dollmaker offered a way to extend her "life" indefinitely...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Dollmaker's Magnum Opus
front.text:
Hunter 1.
<spawn> Any empty location.
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Add 1 <curse> to the chaos bag.
front.flavor_text:
The torsos of three concubines appear to have been inartfully "stitched" together, giving the monstrous creature 
the resemblance of a centipede...

front.text: Peril. Read Scenario Interlude: The Master's Craft in the Campaign Guide.
front.flavor_text: The intricate construction of the mannequins you've seen in the palace suggest a practiced hand...

front.text: <rev> Test <agility> (3). If you fail, take 1 damage and, for each point you failed by, move once towards the nearest <t>Surface</t> location.
front.flavor_text:
The serpent's shifting has loosened the earth; you hear the sound of rushing wind mere moments before you 
feel the ground quaking beneath your feet...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Eternal Slumber
front.text:
Massive. Protected. Aloof.
Orochimaru has +1<per> health and is considered to be at every investigator's location.
front.flavor_text: The eternal nemesis of the Guardian Jiraiya, the fearsome Orochimaru slipped into silent repose after his prey "eluded" him once the pantheon fell.

back.name: Orochimaru
back.subtitle: Bane of August
back.text: Massive. Alert. Revenge -- Instead of discarding , remove all damage and doom from it and flip it instead. Orochimaru has +1 health and is considered to be at every investigator's location.
back.flavor_text: The Stewards of August believed the Orochimaru possesses nine separate heads, though none of their rangers ever lived long enough to actually count of all them.
back.title: <unique><name>

front.text: Peril. If Orochimaru (Eternal Slumber) is in play, flip it. Test (3). If you fail, shuffle back into the encounter deck and Orochimaru (Bane of August) makes an immediate attack against you.
front.flavor_text: You feel Mount Kokoro tremble in fear as the alabaster serpent rejoins the hunt. There is nowhere to hide...

front.text: Peril. If Yuki-onna is in the victory display, put her into play at the Scarlet Omen location, place in the victory display, and place 1 clue (from the token pool) on Yuki-onna for each copy of in the victory display. Otherwise, place in the victory display and take 1 horror.
front.flavor_text: It's been so long since she had a warm meal...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Lunar Queen
front.text: Hunter X. Alert. When the enemy phase begins: Move a clue from 's location onto . Revenge -- Move all clues on onto her location. gets +X health. X is the number of clues on her.
front.flavor_text:
Travelers braving snowstorms in Minakami are often warned of the 
Yuki-onna, who is said to prey on weak-willed men to drain 
their vitality and leave them as frostbitten corpses.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: First of the Nightfallen
front.text:
You have 1 additional arcane slot. 
<reaction> When an enemy is defeated at your location, exhaust <name>: Heal 1 damage from a card you control.
front.flavor_text:
Once twisted by the madness of Moloch's corruption, 
the noble spirit of Onigawa's "vampyr queen" 
seeks atonement for her past transgressions.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Lunar Queen
front.text:
Permanent. Yuki Yagami deck only. 
You get +1 <willpower> and gain the <t>Vampyr</t> trait.
<reaction> After you defeat an enemy, exhaust <name>: Heal 1 damage from your investigator.
front.flavor_text:
Your blood quickens as the translucent orb 
emits a soft, familiar pulse...

front.text: <rev> Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. If any weaknesses are discarded in this way, draw them. Then, if no weakness is drawn by this effect, test <willpower> (3). If you fail, you must either take 1 direct horror or exhaust an <t>Aspect</t> asset you control.
front.flavor_text:
The strange light reflected from the 
bloodstained moon disorients you...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Cleaver of Dusk
front.text: If is ready: Fight. Add your to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage. If you would fail this skill test, you may exhaust to automatically succeed instead.
front.flavor_text: Tsurugi was said to be the mightiest of all the Guardians; his breath was the fuel that ignited the fire beneath Mount Kokoro.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Cutlass of Dawn
front.text: If is ready: Fight. Add your to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage. If you would fail this skill test, you may exhaust to automatically succeed instead.
front.flavor_text: Midori was the wisest of all Guardians; her skills in diplomacy were critical to the creation of the Covenant with Onigawa.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: A Spark Yet Remains
front.text:
Permanent.
<free> If you control Tsurugi's Might and Midori's Cunning: Exile Tsurugi's Might and Midori's Cunning, then flip <name>.
front.flavor_text:
Separately, the Guardians were unable 
to stand against Moloch...

back.name: Kanon's Quill
back.subtitle: Avenger of the Pantheon
back.text: cannot leave play. If is ready: Fight. Add your highest non- skill to your skill value for this test. This attack deals +1 damage. If you fail, you must perform a Sacrifice or exhaust .
back.flavor_text: ...but together, their power would be unstoppable.
back.title: <unique><name>

front.subtitle: The Dark Side of the Moon
front.text: <for> When the investigation phase ends: Each investigator at <name> takes 1 damage.
front.flavor_text:
The view is indescribable, but the thin atmosphere 
makes it somewhat difficult to breathe...

back.flavor_text:
Bled of its crimson hue, a curious rune described upon 
the lunar surface is now revealed to you...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: What Was Lost in the Fire
front.text: <reaction> When a <blessing> token would be added to the chaos bag: Seal that token here, instead. Investigators at any location may trigger this reaction.
front.flavor_text:
At the center of the runic confluence, 
a superheated capsule sizzles within a deep crater...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Noblesse Oblige
front.text:
While resolving chaos tokens during a skill test, investigators may treat <blessing> tokens as if they were <elder_sign> tokens.
<action> Search the chaos bag for 1 <blessing> token and 1 <curse> token and return them to the token pool: Add 1 harmony token to the chaos bag. Investigators at any location may activate this ability.
front.flavor_text: Ashes to ashes.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Soul Still Burns
front.text:
<for> When the enemy phase begins: Deal 1 damage to each enemy in play that is not in the sacrifice display.
<action> Search the chaos bag for 1 <blessing> token and 1 <curse> token and return them to the token pool: Add 1 harmony token to the chaos bag. Investigators at any location may activate this ability.
front.flavor_text: The pantheon's Lord of War always answers the call of battle.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Fire Will Never Fade
front.text:
While in an investigator's hand or committed to a skill test, each non-weakness card gains <wild> <wild>.
<action> Search the chaos bag for 1 <blessing> token and 1 <curse> token and return them to the token pool: Add 1 harmony token to the chaos bag. Investigators at any location may activate this ability.
front.flavor_text: Long live the King.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Where There Is Smoke
front.text:
Investigators gain an additional action during their turn.
<action> Search the chaos bag for 1 <blessing> token and 1 <curse> token and return them to the token pool: Add 1 harmony token to the chaos bag. Investigators at any location may activate this ability.
front.flavor_text: Your chariot of fire awaits.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Hell Hath No Fury
front.text:
Investigators may ignore the first attack of opportunity they would take during their turn.
<action> Search the chaos bag for 1 <blessing> token and 1 <curse> token and return them to the token pool: Add 1 harmony token to the chaos bag. Investigators at any location may activate this ability.
front.flavor_text:
Under the watchful eye of its mother, Mount Kokoro 
has survived aeons of strife...and it will not fall today.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Breaker of the New Dawn
front.text:
When an investigator resolves a <blessing> or <curse> token during a skill test, they may return that token to the chaos bag after the test ends.
<action> Search the chaos bag for 1 <blessing> token and 1 <curse> token and return them to the token pool: Add 1 harmony token to the chaos bag. Investigators at any location may activate this ability.
front.flavor_text: No more monkey business.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Resurgent Sovereign
front.text: Hunter 1. Retaliate. Sacrifice -- Add 1 tokens to the chaos bag. Revenge -- Shuffle into the sacrifice deck.
front.flavor_text:
The power hungry lord of the tides hoped to seize control of the pantheon by offering his dark patron a 
sacrifice borne of his own flesh and blood.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Watery Grave
front.text: Sacrifice -- Each investigator must take 1 direct horror.
front.flavor_text:
The iridescent scales on the mermaid's limp body 
shimmer beneath the pale moonlight...

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Dowager of Lost Hope
front.text:
<reaction> After you defeat an enemy: Add 1 <blessing> token to the chaos bag or search the chaos bag for 1 <curse> token and return it to the token pool. Investigators at any location may trigger this reaction.
<action><action> Exhaust <name>: Add X <blessing> tokens to the chaos bag, where X is the number of revealed locations with no clues on them.
front.flavor_text: "The Guardians have not given up on us. We must not give up on them."

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Infernal Engine
front.text:
Aloof. Protected.
<for> At the start of the enemy phase: The lead investigator must choose a non-<t>Elite</t> enemy that is not in the sacrifice display, if able, and discard it. If they do, they must place 1 doom on Moloch.
front.flavor_text:
Countless millennia of sacrifices power 
the engine of his resurrection.

back.name: Moloch
back.subtitle: The Ghost of Onigawa
back.text:
Massive. Hunter 2. Retaliate.
<name> gets +1 health for each doom on Moloch.
<for> When an investigator is defeated: Search the chaos bag for all <blessing> tokens and return them to the token pool.
back.flavor_text:
"There are many fates worse than death... 
Allow me to demonstrate."
back.title: <unique><name>

front.text: Sacrifice -- Place 1 doom on each Elite enemy in play (including any in the sacrifice display).
front.flavor_text:
The Scribes of August poured over the ancient apocrypha in their attempts to better understand the nature of 
the threat they faced. Many were not strong 
enough to handle the truth.

front.text: Retaliate. Sacrifice -- Put into play at the location of the investigator with the least remaining health.
front.flavor_text: Many swordsmen who could not protect their liege lords during the siege of Onigawa hoped they could find redemption in the service of a new master.

front.text: Sacrifice -- Place one clue on each investigator's location (from the token pool). The lead investigator may choose one other card in the sacrifice display and shuffle it back into the sacrifice deck (and then draw the top card of the sacrifice deck and add it to the end of the sacrifice display).
front.flavor_text: Rather than becoming subject to the tender mercies of the Stewards of August, many prospective shrine maidens preferred to take their fate into their own hands.

front.text: Sacrifice -- Each investigator must take 1 direct horror.
front.flavor_text:
It was not uncommon for members of the court to "donate" their lowborn paramours to the Stewards of August 
once they were finished with them.

front.text: Sacrifice -- Each investigator must search the chaos bag for 1 token and return it to the token pool. If you cannot, add 1 token to the chaos bag instead.
front.flavor_text:
The Rangers of August were often tasked with 
recovering wayward shrine maidens who 
became "lost" in the wilderness.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Karasu
front.text:
Permanent.
<free> Before revealing chaos tokens while fighting, exhaust <name>: If this attack is successful, it deals +1 damage. 
<for> At the end of the round: If you dealt damage to an enemy this round, exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Shika
front.text:
Permanent.
<free> Before revealing chaos tokens while investigating, exhaust <name>: If you succeed, discover an additional clue at your location.
<for> At the end of the round: If you successfully investigated this round, exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Okami
front.text:
Permanent.
<name> can only be assigned damage or horror if it is ready. 
<for> After you resolve a non-<elder_sign> or <blessing> symbol token during a skill test: Exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Tanuki
front.text:
Permanent.
<reaction> After you evade an enemy, exhaust <name>: Gain X resources, where X is the evaded enemy's evade value. 
<for> At the start of your turn: You must either pay 1 resource or exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Kaeru
front.text:
Permanent.
<for> At the end of the round: If you did not take your turn first during the investigation phase this round, exhaust <name>.
<free> Exhaust <name>: You get +1<per> skill value for this test.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Yukihyo
front.text:
Permanent.
<reaction> If <name> is ready when your turn begins: You gain an additional action this turn that may only be used to engage or fight an enemy.
<for> At the end of the round: If you dealt damage to an enemy this round, exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Kitsune
front.text:
Permanent. Uses (2 charges). 
If <name> is ready, you may spend charges on it to pay the costs of activated abilities printed on assets you control.
<for> At the end of the round: If you failed a skill test this round, exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: Blessing of the Heron
front.text:
Permanent.
<free> Exhaust <name>: Move to another investigator's location.
<for> At the end of the round: If you performed a basic move action this round, exhaust <name>.

front.title: <unique><name>
front.subtitle: The Elder Twin
front.text:
You have 1 additional hand slot.
<free> Exhaust Mayu Tachibana and add 1 <blessing> token to the chaos bag: You get +1 skill value for this test.
front.flavor_text: "I made a promise to my sister..."

front.text: <rev> Test <willpower> (3). If you fail, you must either place 1 doom on the current agenda or take 1 direct damage.
front.flavor_text:
She was young, innocent, and beautiful...
and now she's gone.

front.text: <rev> Test <willpower> (3). If you fail, you must either place 1 doom on the current agenda or take 1 direct horror.
front.flavor_text: You couldn't save her. Maybe you can't save anyone.

front.text:
<rev> Test <willpower> (4). If you fail, put <name> into play in your threat area.
You cannot trigger <action>, <free>, or <reaction> abilities on assets you control that take up at least 1 hand slot.
<reaction> When your turn ends: Discard <name>.
front.flavor_text:
Your hands begin to go numb as 
a thin layer of frost coats your fingers...
